raw_consumer_statement: On my best buy credit card I have paperless and also auto pay. I recieved a statement in the mail witch I thought was unusual because im paperless. So I opened the statement and it said congratulations your credit limit increased. Then as I was reading the statement as my laptop I purchased should have been close to being paid off. Well I saw an outstanding balance witch was more then the price of my laptop. I was shocked looked into the statement and it said I have been paying a monthly fee for XXXX XXXX some streaming cable TV. I called XXXX and told them I never purchased their service and the customer service rep could see on her end I had never logged into their service to watch. She said she would expedite a refund but would have to come from supervision and she would send it up to them. I also called best buy to let them know what was goin on. This was a whole year from XX/XX/2024 til just a few months ago. They both said they would do investigation and neither refunded me for the amount taken out each month. Didn't know what to do and someone told me to reach out here.
